sql-v2.title: SQL Foundations
sql-v2.moreComingSoon: More SQL Foundations lessons are coming soon.

sql-v2-0.title: Getting Started with SQL and Databases
sql-v2-0.description: Build the learner's mental model before syntax: what SQL is, how databases organize information, and how questions become queries.
why: Builds confidence with getting started with sql and databases.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-1.title: Your First Queries with SELECT
sql-v2-1.description: Teach learners to retrieve data confidently with SELECT and FROM before filtering or joining tables.
why: Builds confidence with your first queries with select.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-2.title: Filtering Data with WHERE
sql-v2-2.description: Introduce decision-making in queries by teaching learners to keep only the rows they actually need.
why: Builds confidence with filtering data with where.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-3.title: Sorting and Limiting Results
sql-v2-3.description: Help beginners control output so answers are easier to read, rank, and compare.
why: Builds confidence with sorting and limiting results.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-4.title: Working with Text, Lists, Ranges, and NULL
sql-v2-4.description: Expand filtering to real-world cases like partial text, multiple choices, ranges, and missing values.
why: Builds confidence with working with text, lists, ranges, and null.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-0-1.title: What SQL Is
sql-v2-0-1.description: Learn what sql means, what a database is, why sql is useful through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-0-2.title: Understanding Tables
sql-v2-0-2.description: Learn rows and columns, records and fields, table names and column names through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-0-3.title: Database Thinking
sql-v2-0-3.description: Learn how data is organized, one table vs multiple tables, intro to keys through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-0-4.title: First SQL Environment
sql-v2-0-4.description: Learn where sql runs, sql editor basics, running your first query through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-1-1.title: Intro to SELECT
sql-v2-1-1.description: Learn what select does, selecting all columns with star, selecting specific columns through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-1-2.title: Reading Data from a Table
sql-v2-1-2.description: Learn from and table names, choosing the right columns, viewing clean results through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-1-3.title: SQL Syntax Basics
sql-v2-1-3.description: Learn keywords, semicolons, uppercase vs lowercase through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-1-4.title: Practice with Basic Queries
sql-v2-1-4.description: Learn query one column, query multiple columns, query full tables through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-2-1.title: Intro to Filtering
sql-v2-2-1.description: Learn why filtering matters, the where clause, matching exact values through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-2-2.title: Comparison Operators
sql-v2-2-2.description: Learn equals comparison, not equal comparison, greater than comparison through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-2-3.title: Filtering with Multiple Conditions
sql-v2-2-3.description: Learn and conditions, or conditions, not conditions through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-2-4.title: Beginner Filtering Practice
sql-v2-2-4.description: Learn filter by number, filter by text, filter by more than one rule through focused examples and practice.
bullets: filter by more than one rule

sql-v2-3-1.title: Sorting Data
sql-v2-3-1.description: Learn why sorting matters, order by, ascending order through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-3-2.title: Sorting by Multiple Columns
sql-v2-3-2.description: Learn primary sort, secondary sort, sorting text through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-3-3.title: Limiting Output
sql-v2-3-3.description: Learn why limit results, limit clause, top rows only through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-3-4.title: Practice with Output Control
sql-v2-3-4.description: Learn find highest values, find lowest values, show top 5 records through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-4-1.title: Text Matching
sql-v2-4-1.description: Learn intro to like, percent wildcard, underscore wildcard through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-4-2.title: Lists and Ranges
sql-v2-4-2.description: Learn in list filter, not in list filter, between range filter through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-4-3.title: Missing Data
sql-v2-4-3.description: Learn what null means, is null, is not null through focused examples and practice.

sql-v2-4-4.title: Search and Cleanup Practice
sql-v2-4-4.description: Learn search names, filter statuses, find missing data through focused examples and practice.
